description: A designed square 'THE WORST FIRST' arrest card in the standard template. Background is the recurring high-contrast black-and-white close-up of open hands in handcuffs with a dark gradient on the left. Top-left light-cyan small-caps serif headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with white subline '2/14/2025 | Boston, MA'. Red diagonal corner banner top-right reads 'BOSTON'. Large bold white name at mid-left: 'Allison Jane Marchese' (an Anglo female name, notable as most cards in the set feature Hispanic or foreign male names). Bold white 'CRIMES:' label with three bullets: 'Obscene communications w/student', 'Unlawful restraint', and 'Reckless endangerment'. Bottom-left round DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark; bottom-right red box '-THE- WORST FIRST'. A generic stock handcuffs image substitutes for a mugshot. Propaganda technique: serious charges tied to a named individual and city tag to portray ICE removing dangerous offenders. Target audience: general public and Boston-area media.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/14/2025 | Boston, MA; Allison Jane Marchese; CRIMES: Obscene communications w/student; Unlawful restraint; Reckless endangerment; BOSTON; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
